title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: Deepseek V4 is a large language model featuring a 1 million token context window and hybrid attention mechanisms. The model employs techniques including Composite Sparse Attention, Hybrid Chunk Attention, sliding window attention, and Muon optimizers to achieve efficiency gains while maintaining state-of-the-art results.
